Shiv Sena (UBT) and Congress leaders criticize the match as immoral and profit-driven, citing past grievances and questioning the government's stance. BJP leaders, however, rally behind the Indian team, framing it as a matter of national pride. Maharashtra leaders exchange barbs, highlighting the deep divisions surrounding the event.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/politics-heats-up-over-india-pak-asia-cup-match-opposition-corners-centre-bjp-cites-compulsion/articleshow/123870097.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/politics-heats-up-over-india-pak-asia-cup-match-opposition-corners-centre-bjp-cites-compulsion/articleshow/123870097.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 19:51:20 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1103016" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123870868,imgsize-1103016.cms"/></item><item><title>Trump steps back from India, takes aim at Europe and China in latest Russia sanctions plan</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/trump-now-puts-onus-on-nato-to-stop-russian-oil-imports/articleshow/123871393.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/trump-now-puts-onus-on-nato-to-stop-russian-oil-imports/articleshow/123871393.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 20:50:30 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>CHIDANAND RAJGHATTA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="124508" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123871391,imgsize-124508.cms"/></item><item><title>'Salami slicing': Russia's incursion into Poland - How Putin has riled Trump, again</title><description><![CDATA[Following a Russian drone incursion into Polish airspace, NATO scrambled jets, raising alarms across Europe. Trump's initial ambiguous response, downplaying the incident, unsettled allies who view Poland's security as vital to NATO's credibility. This event highlights concerns about Trump's commitment to defending NATO allies and his perceived hesitation in confronting Russian aggression, potentially emboldening further provocations.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/salami-slicing-russias-incursion-into-poland-how-putin-has-riled-trump-again/articleshow/123872315.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/salami-slicing-russias-incursion-into-poland-how-putin-has-riled-trump-again/articleshow/123872315.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 22:26:54 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1561089" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123872345,imgsize-1561089.cms"/></item><item><title>IND vs PAK boycott: Ex-cricketer and BJP leader reiterates - ‘Shouldn’t be played’</title><description><![CDATA[Following the recent terror attack in Pahalgam, calls to boycott India's Asia Cup clash with Pakistan intensify. Kedar Jadhav reiterates his stance against the match, echoing strong public sentiment. While the Indian team acknowledges the sensitivity, they remain focused on cricket, guided by government and BCCI instructions, as emphasized by fielding coach Ryan ten Doeschate.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/amid-india-vs-pakistan-boycott-calls-former-cricketer-and-bjp-leader-reiterates-stance-this-match-shouldnt-/articleshow/123872301.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/amid-india-vs-pakistan-boycott-calls-former-cricketer-and-bjp-leader-reiterates-stance-this-match-shouldnt-/articleshow/123872301.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 22:31:41 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="236634" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123872380,imgsize-236634.cms"/></item><item><title>'Violation of women's dignity': FIR against Cong leaders over AI clip of PM's mother</title><description><![CDATA[An FIR has been filed in Delhi against Congress leaders following the circulation of an AI-generated video featuring Prime Minister Narendra Modi and his late mother. The video, shared by the Bihar Congress, has been described as defamatory and insulting. BJP leaders have strongly condemned the video, while Congress defends it as not disrespectful, sparking a political controversy.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/fir-registered-against-congress-leaders-over-al-video-of-pm-modis-mother/articleshow/123870239.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/fir-registered-against-congress-leaders-over-al-video-of-pm-modis-mother/articleshow/123870239.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 18:49:01 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="949039" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123870291,imgsize-949039.cms"/></item><item><title>Nano Banana trend: Turn photos into 3D figurines with Google AI Studio; 15 easy prompts</title><description><![CDATA[Google's new AI image editor, "Nano Banana," integrated into the Gemini app, allows users to effortlessly transform photos into 3D models. This tool, officially known as Gemini 2.5 Flash Image, has seen widespread adoption, with over 200 million images created or modified. Users can easily generate 3D figurines, designer pet toys, and fantasy avatars using simple text prompts.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/nano-banana-trend-15-easy-prompts-to-turn-photos-into-3d-figurines-with-google-ai-studio/articleshow/123863920.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/nano-banana-trend-15-easy-prompts-to-turn-photos-into-3d-figurines-with-google-ai-studio/articleshow/123863920.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 10:31:37 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="61062" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123863941,imgsize-61062.cms"/></item><item><title>Davis Cup: Epic! India defeat Switzerland for a rare milestone since 1993</title><description><![CDATA[India have made it to the Davis Cup Qualifiers. Sumit Nagal's win over Henry Bernet sealed the victory against Switzerland. This is India's first away win against a European team since 1993. Nagal's return to the Davis Cup proved crucial. Earlier, N Sriram Balaji and Rithvik Bollipalli lost the doubles match. The Davis Cup Qualifiers are scheduled for January 2026.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/tennis/top-stories/epic-indian-tennis-scripts-history-at-davis-cup-defeats-switzerland-for-a-rare-milestone-since-1993/articleshow/123871792.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/tennis/top-stories/epic-indian-tennis-scripts-history-at-davis-cup-defeats-switzerland-for-a-rare-milestone-since-1993/articleshow/123871792.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 21:45:43 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="219150" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123871877,imgsize-219150.cms"/></item><item><title>'Horrific': Vivek Ramaswamy on beheading of Indian-origin man in US</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/horrific-vivek-ramaswamy-speaks-out-on-beheading-of-indian-origin-chandra-nagamallaiah-after-backlash/articleshow/123870820.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/horrific-vivek-ramaswamy-speaks-out-on-beheading-of-indian-origin-chandra-nagamallaiah-after-backlash/articleshow/123870820.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 19:43:43 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="42754" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123870821,imgsize-42754.cms"/></item><item><title>Charlie Kirk’s killing: Musk questions Microsoft over staff's remarks; company responds</title><description><![CDATA[Elon Musk has called out Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella over alleged posts by Activision Blizzard employees celebrating Charlie Kirk's assassination. Screenshots of these posts circulated on X, prompting Musk to question Nadella directly. Microsoft responded, stating they are reviewing the situation and condemning any comments celebrating violence, emphasizing that such views do not align with the company's values.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/whats-going-on-here-elon-musk-questions-microsoft-ceo-satya-nadella-over-some-employees-comments-on-charlie-kirk-read-companys-response/articleshow/123871702.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/whats-going-on-here-elon-musk-questions-microsoft-ceo-satya-nadella-over-some-employees-comments-on-charlie-kirk-read-companys-response/articleshow/123871702.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 21:31:36 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1422447" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123871757,imgsize-1422447.cms"/></item><item><title>SC dismisses NUJS's sexual harassment complaint; orders VC to mention judgment in resume</title><description><![CDATA[The Supreme Court dismissed a sexual harassment complaint against the NUJS Vice-Chancellor, citing a delay in filing beyond the POSH Act's limitation period. While the court acknowledged the delayed complaint, it directed that the judgment be included in the Vice-Chancellor's resume. This unusual directive serves as a permanent record of the allegations, despite their dismissal on procedural grounds.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/not-to-forget-wrongdoing-sc-dismisses-nujss-sexual-harassment-complaint-orders-vc-to-mention-judgment-in-resume/articleshow/123867569.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/not-to-forget-wrongdoing-sc-dismisses-nujss-sexual-harassment-complaint-orders-vc-to-mention-judgment-in-resume/articleshow/123867569.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 15:38:24 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="23152" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123867834,imgsize-23152.cms"/></item><item><title>Asia Cup: Big blow to India ahead of Pakistan game! Star batter hit on the hands</title><description><![CDATA[India faced a scare ahead of their crucial Asia Cup match against Pakistan as Shubman Gill was struck on the hand during practice, causing visible discomfort. The team physio attended to him, and his condition is being closely monitored. This setback occurs just before the highly anticipated clash, adding pressure to India's preparations.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/big-blow-to-india-ahead-of-pakistan-game-star-batter-hitonthehands/articleshow/123871206.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/big-blow-to-india-ahead-of-pakistan-game-star-batter-hitonthehands/articleshow/123871206.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 20:36:18 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>PRATYUSH RAJ</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="175402" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123871256,imgsize-175402.cms"/></item><item><title>'Left no choice': Amazon suspends engineer; sent 'threatening' letter to CEO</title><description><![CDATA[Amazon has suspended a Palestinian software engineer for criticizing its business ties with Israel, specifically the Project Nimbus cloud computing contract. Ahmed Shahrour's internal communications expressing opposition led to his suspension and an ongoing investigation. He alleges the company suppresses pro-Palestinian voices, a claim Amazon denies, while similar protests have resulted in terminations at Microsoft and Google.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/amazon-suspends-engineer-who-sent-threatening-letter-to-ceo-andy-jassy-saying-i-am-left-with-no-choice-but-to-/articleshow/123849551.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/amazon-suspends-engineer-who-sent-threatening-letter-to-ceo-andy-jassy-saying-i-am-left-with-no-choice-but-to-/articleshow/123849551.cms</guid><pubDate>Fri, 12 Sep 2025 15:34:45 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="36658" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123849512,imgsize-36658.cms"/></item><item><title>‘50–100% tariff’: Trump threatens China; presses Nato to unite on Russia sanctions</title><description><![CDATA[Donald Trump has proposed significant tariffs on Chinese goods and urged NATO allies to cease oil purchases from Russia to swiftly end the war in Ukraine. He criticized NATO's commitment and blamed Biden and Zelenskyy for prolonging the conflict.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/international-business/50-100-tariff-trump-launches-massive-threat-tirade-on-china-seeks-quick-end-to-ukraine-war/articleshow/123870185.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/international-business/50-100-tariff-trump-launches-massive-threat-tirade-on-china-seeks-quick-end-to-ukraine-war/articleshow/123870185.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 18:43:51 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI BUSINESS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="950608" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123870153,imgsize-950608.cms"/></item><item><title>Are you experiencing 'tall poppy syndrome'? Subtle workplace signs to notice</title><description><![CDATA[Tall Poppy Syndrome, prevalent globally but originating in Australia and New Zealand, describes the phenomenon of high achievers being subtly undermined in workplaces. A study reveals this affects women disproportionately, impacting confidence and mental health. This manifests as exclusion, downplaying ambition, and reluctance to showcase creative work, hindering both individual growth and organizational innovation.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/life-style/relationships/work/are-you-experiencing-tall-poppy-syndrome-subtle-workplace-signs-to-notice/articleshow/123871654.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/life-style/relationships/work/are-you-experiencing-tall-poppy-syndrome-subtle-workplace-signs-to-notice/articleshow/123871654.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 21:26:22 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI LIFESTYLE DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="25498" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123871697,imgsize-25498.cms"/></item><item><title>‘That wasn’t even a moment’: Fans slam NFL over Charlie Kirk tribute; sparks outrage</title><description><![CDATA[The NFL and Green Bay Packers honored Charlie Kirk with a moment of silence before facing the Washington Commanders. Fans called it rushed and poorly executed, slamming the league for inconsistency compared to past public statements. Kirk, 31, was killed Wednesday in Utah. The tribute came as Trump vowed to award him the Presidential Medal of Freedom.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/that-wasnt-even-a-moment-fans-slam-nfl-for-charlie-kirk-tribute-at-lambeau-field/articleshow/123844995.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/that-wasnt-even-a-moment-fans-slam-nfl-for-charlie-kirk-tribute-at-lambeau-field/articleshow/123844995.cms</guid><pubDate>Fri, 12 Sep 2025 11:55:52 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GLOBAL SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="41726" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123845272,imgsize-41726.cms"/></item><item><title>Utah tragedy: Patrick Mahomes silent after Kirk shooting; Randi, Tavia speak out</title><description><![CDATA[Following the tragic shooting death of Charlie Kirk at Utah Valley University, Patrick Mahomes has remained silent. Tavia Hunt, wife of the Chiefs owner, expressed grief and called for civility, a sentiment echoed by Patrick's mother, Randi Mahomes, who shared Tavia's post. The investigation into Kirk's death is ongoing, sparking renewed debate about violence.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/patrick-mahomes-quiet-after-charlie-kirk-shooting-at-utah-as-randi-mahomes-and-tavia-hunt-speaks-out/articleshow/123834745.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/patrick-mahomes-quiet-after-charlie-kirk-shooting-at-utah-as-randi-mahomes-and-tavia-hunt-speaks-out/articleshow/123834745.cms</guid><pubDate>Thu, 11 Sep 2025 21:53:30 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GLOBAL SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1255417" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123834734,imgsize-1255417.cms"/></item><item><title>Sanford International round: John Daly makes history; shocking 19 on 12th hole</title><description><![CDATA[Golf icon John Daly made unwanted history at the Sanford International, carding a shocking 19 on the par-5 12th hole. This score is now the highest ever recorded on a single hole in Champions Tour history. Daly's troubles began with a wayward tee shot, and lead to seven penalty drops.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/international-sports/john-daly-makes-golf-history-after-carding-shocking-19-on-12th-hole-during-sanford-international-opening-round/articleshow/123867041.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/international-sports/john-daly-makes-golf-history-after-carding-shocking-19-on-12th-hole-during-sanford-international-opening-round/articleshow/123867041.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 15:07:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GLOBAL SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="43902" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123867284,imgsize-43902.cms"/></item><item><title>China gold licences: Yellow metal’s largest buyer to ease rules; diversify from dollar </title><description><![CDATA[China is easing gold import/export licensing, aiming to diversify reserves from the US dollar. The People's Bank of China (PBOC) plans to broaden the use of faster “multi-use permits” by increasing authorized ports and extending permit validity. This builds on a 2016 initiative to streamline gold trade.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/international-business/china-gold-licences-yellow-metals-largest-buyer-to-ease-rules-continues-to-diversify-away-from-dollar-reserves/articleshow/123871235.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/international-business/china-gold-licences-yellow-metals-largest-buyer-to-ease-rules-continues-to-diversify-away-from-dollar-reserves/articleshow/123871235.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 20:45:49 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI BUSINESS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="83332" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123871353,imgsize-83332.cms"/></item><item><title>Fact check: Does putting a claw clip on the eyebrow really help with migraines?</title><description><![CDATA[A viral social media trend suggests using claw clips on eyebrows to alleviate migraines, garnering millions of views. While some users report relief, Dr. Suzanne Wylie expresses skepticism, citing a lack of scientific evidence. Neurologist Soniya Tambe Jinde explains the potential benefit through the Gate Control Theory of Pain, where pressure may reduce pain signals reaching the brain. Read below!]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/life-style/health-fitness/health-news/fact-check-does-putting-a-claw-clip-on-the-eyebrow-really-help-with-migraines/articleshow/123871345.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/life-style/health-fitness/health-news/fact-check-does-putting-a-claw-clip-on-the-eyebrow-really-help-with-migraines/articleshow/123871345.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 20:51:15 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI LIFESTYLE DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="24958" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123871350,imgsize-24958.cms"/></item><item><title>Asia Cup: India coach reacts to Pakistan match boycott talks - 'Players are aware'</title><description><![CDATA[Amidst strong calls for boycott following the Pahalgam terror attack, India's cricket team support staff has addressed the sensitive issue before the Asia Cup clash against Pakistan. While acknowledging public sentiment, the team management, led by Gautam Gambhir's message to focus on cricket, emphasized adherence to BCCI and government directives, prioritizing the game while respecting the authorities' decisions.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/india-coach-reacts-to-pakistan-match-boycott-talks-reveals-the-line-they-are-following/articleshow/123871010.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/india-coach-reacts-to-pakistan-match-boycott-talks-reveals-the-line-they-are-following/articleshow/123871010.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 20:37:09 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>PRATYUSH RAJ</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="164660" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123871276,imgsize-164660.cms"/></item><item><title>'Who cares?': Channing Frye targets Pablo Torre — Clippers report heat</title><description><![CDATA[The NBA is investigating the Los Angeles Clippers for alleged salary cap circumvention related to Kawhi Leonard's compensation. Investigative journalist Pablo Torre reported the allegations, sparking reactions from figures like Channing Frye, who initially criticized Torre before walking back his comments. Torre has since responded to Frye's remarks, as the league's investigation continues, with more details expected to emerge.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nba/top-stories/who-cares-former-cleveland-cavaliers-player-channing-frye-shoots-at-pablo-torre-for-his-report-on-los-angeles-clippers/articleshow/123870737.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nba/top-stories/who-cares-former-cleveland-cavaliers-player-channing-frye-shoots-at-pablo-torre-for-his-report-on-los-angeles-clippers/articleshow/123870737.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 19:38:21 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GLOBAL SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="42398" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123870768,imgsize-42398.cms"/></item><item><title>'Connected by shared history': PM Modi's message to Nepal; lauds Sushila Karki</title><description><![CDATA[Prime Minister Narendra Modi, during his visit to Manipur, extended congratulations to Sushila Karki on becoming Nepal's first woman Prime Minister, reaffirming India's strong ties with Nepal. He lauded Nepal's democratic values and the resilience of its people. Modi also addressed the Manipur crisis, assuring support and urging peace for progress in the region.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/connected-by-shared-history-pm-modis-message-to-nepal-from-imphal-lauds-sushila-karki/articleshow/123868438.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/connected-by-shared-history-pm-modis-message-to-nepal-from-imphal-lauds-sushila-karki/articleshow/123868438.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 16:36:23 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1304859" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123868441,imgsize-1304859.cms"/></item><item><title>'Would have frozen to death if': Woman trapped in -20°C freezer, rescued by delivery rider</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/china/would-have-frozen-to-death-if-mother-of-2-trapped-in-20c-freezer-rescued-by-delivery-rider-in-china/articleshow/123870475.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/china/would-have-frozen-to-death-if-mother-of-2-trapped-in-20c-freezer-rescued-by-delivery-rider-in-china/articleshow/123870475.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 19:20:13 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="21816" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123870623,imgsize-21816.cms"/></item><item><title>Waqf Amendment Act: SC to deliver interim order Monday; ‘waqf by user’ in focus</title><description><![CDATA[The Supreme Court is set to deliver its interim order on Monday regarding petitions challenging the Waqf (Amendment) Act, 2025's constitutional validity. The primary suspect, Dhanraj, a former employee fired for intoxication, repeatedly sought re-employment. After receiving money for liquor, Dhanraj, along with an accomplice Daniel, returned and attacked Srikanth when his job request was denied.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/hyderabad/real-estate-bizman-stabbed-to-death/articleshow/123858276.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/hyderabad/real-estate-bizman-stabbed-to-death/articleshow/123858276.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 00:03:51 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>MAHESH BUDDI</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1094384" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123863244,imgsize-1094384.cms"/></item><item><title>Saquon Barkley vs Chiefs: Bold warning to defense — Super Bowl rematch set</title><description><![CDATA[Saquon Barkley fired back at the Kansas City Chiefs ahead of the Philadelphia Eagles’ Super Bowl LIX rematch. Barkley looks to bounce back as Philadelphia visits Arrowhead Stadium on Sept. 14.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/saquon-barkley-fires-back-at-chiefs-defense-with-bold-warning-before-super-bowl-rematch/articleshow/123870596.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/saquon-barkley-fires-back-at-chiefs-defense-with-bold-warning-before-super-bowl-rematch/articleshow/123870596.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 19:19:34 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GLOBAL SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="47988" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123870619,imgsize-47988.cms"/></item><item><title>‘I salute the valour’: PM pays tribute to BSF constable, hails Manipur’s role in Op Sindoor</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/valiant-sons-of-manipur-played-key-role-in-operation-sindoor-pm-modi-pays-tribute-to-martyr-deepak-chingakham/articleshow/123868751.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/valiant-sons-of-manipur-played-key-role-in-operation-sindoor-pm-modi-pays-tribute-to-martyr-deepak-chingakham/articleshow/123868751.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 16:57:56 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="833941" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123868794,imgsize-833941.cms"/></item><item><title>'Just say when': Donald Trump pleads Nato nations to sanction Russia</title><description><![CDATA[Donald Trump stated his willingness to impose significant sanctions on Russia, contingent on all NATO nations ceasing Russian oil imports and implementing similar measures. Trump also suggested imposing substantial tariffs on China until the Ukraine war concludes.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/international-business/just-say-when-trump-pleads-nato-nations-to-sanction-russia-questions-blocs-will/articleshow/123868915.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/international-business/just-say-when-trump-pleads-nato-nations-to-sanction-russia-questions-blocs-will/articleshow/123868915.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 17:23:21 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="44420" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123869077,imgsize-44420.cms"/></item><item><title>Delhi's Bhai Dooj gift: Pink Card registration begins from Oct; free bus travel for women</title><description><![CDATA[The Delhi government is gearing up to launch its Pink Card initiative by mid-October, offering women lifetime free bus travel as a Bhai Dooj gift. He suggests Virat Kohli's absence makes India's batting line-up vulnerable if Pakistan's bowlers strike early. India's recent Asia Cup opener saw a dominant win against UAE, fueled by Kuldeep Yadav's spell and quickfire batting.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/virat-kohli-isnt-there-former-pakistan-captain-misbah-ul-haq-warns-india-ahead-of-asia-cup-clash/articleshow/123869403.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/virat-kohli-isnt-there-former-pakistan-captain-misbah-ul-haq-warns-india-ahead-of-asia-cup-clash/articleshow/123869403.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 18:14:10 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="48338" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123869819,imgsize-48338.cms"/></item><item><title>‘Image must change’: Tharoor says India seen unsafe for women; flags tourism inequality</title><description><![CDATA[Shashi Tharoor urges India to prioritize women's safety for tourism growth. He emphasizes the need for more hotels and improved infrastructure. He notes that India attracts fewer tourists than smaller destinations. Tharoor calls for giving tourism greater priority.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/image-must-change-tharoor-says-india-seen-unsafe-for-women-flags-tourism-inequality/articleshow/123869351.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/image-must-change-tharoor-says-india-seen-unsafe-for-women-flags-tourism-inequality/articleshow/123869351.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 17:39:49 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="24464" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123869341,imgsize-24464.cms"/></item><item><title>Asia Cup: Shoaib Akhtar's brutal India vs Pakistan prediction - 'Hammer you down'</title><description><![CDATA[India and Pakistan are set to clash in a highly anticipated Asia Cup match in Dubai, following dominant wins in their opening games. The match promises to be an exciting chapter in the storied rivalry.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/pakistan-icon-shoaib-akhtars-brutal-india-vs-pakistan-prediction-hammer-you-down/articleshow/123868475.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/asia-cup/pakistan-icon-shoaib-akhtars-brutal-india-vs-pakistan-prediction-hammer-you-down/articleshow/123868475.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 16:46:55 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="56812" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123868546,imgsize-56812.cms"/></item><item><title>Pune techie attacked with billhook outside Vimannagar; accused arrested</title><description><![CDATA[In Pune, a 33-year-old IT professional was brutally attacked with a billhook outside his fiancée's workplace in Vimannagar. Two men, later arrested, assaulted him due to mistaken identity, fueled by a cab driver's suspicion of a love affair. The victim sustained severe injuries, prompting calls for increased security and patrolling in the area, highlighting rising concerns about criminal activities.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/pune/it-professional-fractures-right-arm-in-billhook-attack-two-held/articleshow/123859130.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/pune/it-professional-fractures-right-arm-in-billhook-attack-two-held/articleshow/123859130.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 02:59:45 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>ALIM SHAIKH</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="40396" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123864743,imgsize-40396.cms"/></item><item><title>ITR filing: Over 6 cr returns submitted so far; Sept 15 deadline looms for taxpayers</title><description><![CDATA[The Income Tax Department announced it has received over six crore income tax returns for the Assessment Year 2025-26. ITR submissions have been steadily increasing, with a record 7.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/financial-literacy/taxation/itr-filing-over-6-crore-returns-submitted-so-far-september-15-deadline-looms-for-taxpayers/articleshow/123867615.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/financial-literacy/taxation/itr-filing-over-6-crore-returns-submitted-so-far-september-15-deadline-looms-for-taxpayers/articleshow/123867615.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 15:27:38 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI BUSINESS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="129414" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123867672,imgsize-129414.cms"/></item><item><title>'Chased frail lady before stamping on her': Indian-origin man kills mother in UK; jailed for life</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/uk/i-just-lost-my-head-indian-origin-man-kills-mother-in-uk-jailed-for-life/articleshow/123867234.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/uk/i-just-lost-my-head-indian-origin-man-kills-mother-in-uk-jailed-for-life/articleshow/123867234.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 15:38:02 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="19748" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123867989,imgsize-19748.cms"/></item><item><title>IND vs PAK | 'Big match, but not for Pakistan': Saim Ayub makes massive claim</title><description><![CDATA[Saim Ayub downplays the hype surrounding the upcoming Asia Cup clash between Pakistan and India, emphasizing the team's focus on the present and their goal of winning the tournament. The attackers, who repeatedly assaulted Agarwal with a pressure cooker and stabbed her, sought access to valuables. After the murder, they stole gold and cash, changed clothes, and fled, but were traced via CCTV footage and a manpower agent.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/hyderabad/hyderabad-murder-case-accused-who-repeatedly-struck-renuka-agarwal-with-pressure-cooker-arrested-in-ranchi/articleshow/123863576.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/hyderabad/hyderabad-murder-case-accused-who-repeatedly-struck-renuka-agarwal-with-pressure-cooker-arrested-in-ranchi/articleshow/123863576.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 10:12:38 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>MAHESH BUDDI</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="16073" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123863594,imgsize-16073.cms"/></item><item><title>Luka Doncic meets Sharapova: $25M milestone; fans react to viral moment </title><description><![CDATA[Luka Doncic, the Los Angeles Lakers star, made headlines during the 2025 EuroBasket despite Slovenia's loss to Germany. He also reflected on his initial nervousness playing against his teammate LeBron James, whom he idolizes.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nba/top-stories/luka-doni-shares-a-25-million-milestone-moment-with-former-tennis-icon-maria-sharapova/articleshow/123869690.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nba/top-stories/luka-doni-shares-a-25-million-milestone-moment-with-former-tennis-icon-maria-sharapova/articleshow/123869690.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 18:07:37 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GLOBAL SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="31296" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123869695,imgsize-31296.cms"/></item><item><title>'Will watch in burqa’: Nitesh Rane mocks Aaditya over India–Pakistan match</title><description><![CDATA[Maharashtra Minister Nitesh Rane mocked Aaditya Thackeray, suggesting he'd secretly watch the India-Pakistan cricket match in disguise. This jab followed Thackeray's criticism of the BJP for allowing the match despite Pakistan's history of terrorism.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/will-watch-in-burqa-nitesh-rane-mocks-aaditya-thackeray-over-indiapakistan-match-watch/articleshow/123868392.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/will-watch-in-burqa-nitesh-rane-mocks-aaditya-thackeray-over-indiapakistan-match-watch/articleshow/123868392.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 16:51:13 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="31718" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123868719,imgsize-31718.cms"/></item><item><title>‘RPM was high’: Woman describes moment Thar flew out of Delhi showroom</title><description><![CDATA[A woman testing a Mahindra Thar in a Delhi showroom accidentally accelerated, crashing through a glass wall and plunging 15 feet. The woman has since refuted rumors of serious injury or death, attributing the incident to high RPM.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/delhi/rpm-was-high-woman-describes-moment-thar-flew-out-of-delhi-showrooms-1st-floor/articleshow/123865475.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/delhi/rpm-was-high-woman-describes-moment-thar-flew-out-of-delhi-showrooms-1st-floor/articleshow/123865475.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 12:27:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI CITY DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="30412" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123865537,imgsize-30412.cms"/></item><item><title>Asia Cup: Tit-for-tat! PSL franchise Karachi Kings mirrored IPL's Punjab Kings' veiled reference to Pakistan, sparking online backlash. An Indian Supreme Court plea sought to cancel the match, citing terrorism concerns and national security, but was denied an urgent hearing.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/after-ipl-franchise-now-psl-team-boycotts-india-vs-pakistan-in-tit-for-tat-move/articleshow/123867705.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/after-ipl-franchise-now-psl-team-boycotts-india-vs-pakistan-in-tit-for-tat-move/articleshow/123867705.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Sep 2025 15:40:49 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="81342" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123867840,imgsize-81342.cms"/></item></channel></rss>

       <title><![CDATA[Modi In Manipur: Terms Violence 'Unfortunate', Vows To Turn State Into 'Symbol of Peace']]></title>
       <link><![CDATA[https://www.ndtvprofit.com/nation/modi-in-manipur-terms-violence-unfortunate-vows-to-turn-state-into-symbol-of-peace]]></link>

    <item>
      <title><![CDATA[Emissions tracking halted! Trump’s latest proposal cuts costs, cripples efforts against climate change]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/trump-makes-another-move-to-cost-cut-efforts-against-climate-change-19673370.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[A climate law passed in 2022 under ex-president Joe Biden established a methane fee on oil and gas operations, but Republicans' recently enacted "Big Beautiful Bill" requires such reporting only from 2034. Accordingly, the EPA under Zeldin says it will suspend all data collection until then.]]></description>

    <item>
      <title><![CDATA[A little darpok, a lot jugaadu: Meet Sanjeev Bikhchandani, the father of Indian startups]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/sanjeev-bikhchandani-leadership-lessons-indian-startup-investment-strategies-19673239.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[In this episode of Leadership Language, Sanjeev Bikhchandani, the father of Indian startups and Padma Shri awardee, shares candid insights from his extraordinary journey—from launching Naukri.com in his father’s garage to backing over 140 iconic startups like Zomato and Policybazaar. He reflects on the highs and lows of entrepreneurship, the importance of first-mover advantage, customer validation, and resilience in the face of setbacks. With his signature blend of honesty, pragmatism, and ingenuity, Bikhchandani offers timeless lessons for young entrepreneurs and investors on risk management, spotting opportunities, and building lasting value.]]></description>

    <item>
      <title><![CDATA[Indian REITs poised for a step-change — yields, listings and the road ahead]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/india-reit-yields-diversification-logistics-data-centres-growth-19673206.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[India’s REIT market has moved well past its experimental phase. A new ANAROCK–CREDAI report pegs the sector at a market cap of $18 billion as of August 2025, with projections to cross $25 billion by 2030. Strong office absorption, yield premiums of 6–7%, and rising global capital inflows underpin the growth story. Yet only 20% of India’s institutional-grade real estate is listed under REITs, leaving significant headroom — particularly in southern metros.]]></description>

      <description><![CDATA[Krafton expects India’s gaming market to deliver double-digit annual growth, backed by its massive base of nearly 500 million gamers.       <description><![CDATA[BharatPe is preparing for an IPO, aiming to raise ₹800–1,200 crore in a pre-IPO round. Investors will now weigh profitability against size and growth potential.]]></description>

      <description><![CDATA[Goldman Sachs expects the recent GST cuts to lift India’s consumption sector, projecting 3–5% incremental volume growth in H2FY26.       <description><![CDATA[Life insurers have welcomed the GST exemption on individual life and health policies but are seeking relief on input tax credit for distribution costs and renewals. Kamlesh Rao, MD & CEO of Aditya Birla Sun Life Insurance, told CNBC-TV18 that while customers will see premiums fall by 12–13%, insurers may still bear 3–5% of costs due to unrecoverable ITC.]]></description>

      <description><![CDATA[Darpan Sanghvi, founder of Good Glamm Group, has launched Cofounder Circle, an AI-native accelerator for startups and MSMEs.       <title><![CDATA[Biocon Biologics’ Bengaluru facility gets five observations from US FDA inspection]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/market/stocks/biocon-share-price-biocon-biologics-bengaluru-facility-gets-five-observations-from-us-fda-inspection-19664990.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[After the inspection, the FDA issued a Form 483 with five observations. Biocon said these observations are procedural in nature and do not relate to data integrity, systemic non-compliance, or quality oversight. Shares of Biocon Ltd ended at ₹357.50, down by ₹4.05 or 1.12%, on the BSE today (Sept 4).]]></description>

    <item>
      <title><![CDATA[GST overhaul to cut healthcare costs, boost housing and rural demand, say industry experts]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/economy/gst-reforms-rate-cut-healthcare-costs-infrastructure-housing-rural-economy-19664958.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[India’s sweeping GST reforms are set to reduce healthcare costs, ease homebuilding expenses, and boost rural demand. Industry leaders say the shift to a simpler two-slab system will make insurance more affordable, infrastructure more cost-effective, and farm mechanisation more accessible.]]></description>

      <description><![CDATA[If the government restricts aluminium imports, the domestic industry can increase production.That production will be consumed locally, creating value-added products, Chopra told reporters during the curtain raiser ceremony of ALUMEX India 2025 -- the country's first dedicated aluminium extrusion exhibition.]]></description>
